context: Tests whether the agent designs the correct inventory data model (including version, backorder_limit, reorder_point, and the transactions audit table), implements fulfillment correctly, aggregates multi-warehouse availability properly, and includes schema-level guards against data corruption.

checklist.name: version column present
checklist.description: The inventory_levels table definition includes a 'version' column (integer/bigint) used as an optimistic lock counter

checklist.name: backorder_limit column present
checklist.description: The inventory_levels table includes a 'backorder_limit' column (with 0 meaning unlimited or a sensible default)

checklist.name: reorder_point column present
checklist.description: The inventory_levels table includes a 'reorder_point' column per variant-location

checklist.name: Transactions table type enum
checklist.description: The inventory_transactions table (or equivalent audit log) defines a 'type' field restricted to the values: reserve, release, fulfill, receive, adjust

checklist.name: Transactions quantity sign convention
checklist.description: The inventory_transactions table documentation or code comments explicitly states that negative quantity = decrease and positive quantity = increase (or the implementation consistently applies this convention)

checklist.name: available derived from on_hand minus reserved
checklist.description: available is either stored as on_hand - reserved or computed on read as on_hand - reserved — it is NOT stored as an independent value that diverges from these two fields

checklist.name: CHECK constraint reserved >= 0
checklist.description: The schema includes a database-level CHECK constraint (or equivalent) ensuring reserved cannot go below 0

checklist.name: fulfillInventory decrements both fields
checklist.description: The fulfillInventory function (or equivalent) decrements BOTH on_hand AND reserved in the same atomic operation — not only on_hand

checklist.name: Multi-warehouse uses Math.max(0, available)
checklist.description: The multi-warehouse availability aggregation clamps each location's contribution to Math.max(0, available) before summing — preventing locations with negative available from reducing the total

checklist.name: Multi-warehouse returns byLocation
checklist.description: The availability function returns a per-location breakdown (byLocation map or equivalent) in addition to the total

checklist.name: backorder_limit enforced in reservation
checklist.description: The reserveInventory function (or equivalent) checks backorder_limit when backorder is allowed and rejects reservations that would exceed this limit (when backorder_limit > 0)
